Motion For Relief From Sanctions Order
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Relief from Sanctions issued on July 8, 2002 to Lawrence J. King, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, is scheduled today.
There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long CSR# 8620. (212)
